translations.![Sidekick 同步設定，只有可憐的搜尋字詞同步](/assets/118: ![Sidekick sync settings, only poor search terms are synced](/assets/118e924a1477/1*24LXqcP6raSLufNqU4k6ew.png)
translations.![人員資料部分也不能同步 Google 的帳號資訊](/assets/118e: ![Personnel data section also cannot sync Google account information](/assets/118e924a1477/1*mwF0s6KNZGYOX65EHGtUXA.png)
translations.### [生產力工具] 拋棄 Chrome 投入 Sidekick 瀏覽器的懷抱: ### [Productivity Tool] Ditching Chrome for the Sidekick Browser
translations.#### 內建反追蹤反廣告、記憶體管理功能\n\n: #### Built-in Anti-Tracking, Ad-Blocking, and Memory Management Features
translations.#### 那要如何匯入 Chrome 資料呢？\n\n: #### How to import data from Chrome?
translations.***不太確定日後會不會改成自家的 Sidekick Sync，畢竟這樣才有優化: ***Not sure if they will switch to their own Sidekick Sync in the future, as that would allow better optimization and integration.***
translations.***唯一隱憂是這個產品還太新，不太確定能走多遠；如果因為經營不善可能就會停止開: ***The only concern is that this product is still very new, and it's uncertain how far it will go; if mismanaged, development and maintenance might stop, which would be a great loss! So please help promote and support it!***
translations.**完全關閉 Chrome (! 重要 !，MacOS 用戶請確認 Dock 上: **Completely close Chrome (! Important ! MacOS users please make sure there is no small dot below the Chrome icon in the Dock)**
translations.*Chromium != Chrome，Chromium 是瀏覽器技術核心的開源: *Chromium != Chrome, Chromium is the open-source project that forms the core technology of the browser.*
translations.*Session 不會影響到左邊啟用中的 Application。*\n\n: *Sessions do not affect the active Application on the left.*
translations.*多帳號切換支援的網站不太多，不支援只能先用 Private Mode (無痕模: *Not many websites support multi-account switching; for unsupported sites, you can use Private Mode. Currently, Slack and Notion are supported.*
translations.*如果從首頁加入 Application 後沒出現在左方 Sidebar 可以自: *If an Application added from the homepage doesn't appear in the left Sidebar, you can drag it there manually.*
translations.*更多功能等你來探索體驗！*\n\n: *More features await your exploration and experience!*
translations.*跟 Chrome 不同 Chrome 安裝完的登入帳號就是直接綁定、同步 Go: *Unlike Chrome, which binds and syncs browser data directly with your Google account upon login; **you'll find that after logging into Sidekick, no data is imported. This is because [Google currently blocks all third-party services from accessing sync features](https://help.meetsidekick.com/en/articles/5224854-synchronisation-issues){:target="_blank"}, so Sidekick cannot sync or import data directly through your account.***
translations.*這邊有個小問題，就是如果非建立新帳號（EX: 重裝）就只能書籤、瀏覽紀錄、已存: *There is a small issue here: if you don't create a new account (e.g., reinstall), you can only import bookmarks, browsing history, and saved passwords; extensions cannot be imported automatically. [According to the official Q&A, you have to reinstall extensions yourself from the Chrome extension / app store](https://help.meetsidekick.com/en/articles/4145356-general-faqs){:target="_blank"}.*
translations.- Chromium core, because it needs to sup:
- Chromium core, because it needs to support the extensions I frequently use

- More features to help boost productivity

- Supports MacOS. I usually use Safari on iOS, so I don't require cross-device support.

- Excellent memory management

- Enhanced privacy and anti-tracking

- Effortless migration feature
translations.- Currently, all users who joined are on:
- Currently, all users who joined are on the Early Access plan, which seems unaffected by the Free plan (I have more than 5 Sidebar apps without any issues).

- Currently offering a plan to invite 10 users for 6 months of Pro / invite 20 users for lifetime Pro; so if you like this article, you can download and install via the [in-article link to support me and Sidekick!](https://join.meetsidekick.com/pokbg){:target="_blank"}
translations.- Development Team: Sidekick startup tea:
- Development Team: Sidekick startup team founded in 11/2020 @ San Francisco / Currently fundraising

- Browser Core: Chromium

- Current Stage: early access

- Core Value: **A browser designed specifically to optimize workflows and boost productivity**

- Supported platforms: Windows, Mac OS, Mac OS (M1), Linux (deb), Linux (rpm)

- Extensions: Supports all Chrome Store extensions (bitwarden, lastpass, 1password, grammarly, google translate…)

- Official website: [www.meetsidekick.com](https://join.meetsidekick.com/pokbg){:target="_blank"}
translations.- For dual monitor users, you can also d:
- For dual monitor users, you can also drag a tab into a separate window; the separate window will not have the toolbar on the left.

- [Supports all Chrome extensions, available for direct download from the store](https://chrome.google.com/webstore?hl=zh-TW){:target="_blank"}
translations.- Remember to authorize Sidekick to send: - Remember to authorize Sidekick to send desktop notifications; this way, web notifications will pop up on your computer.
translations.- The Application section on the left an: - The Application section on the left and the Tabs at the top do not affect each other. The Application area is independent and does not appear in the top Tabs.
translations.- The search box can search browsing his:
- The search box can search browsing history and bookmarks; if no results are found, it automatically switches to Google search.

- The top left corner shows data on anti-tracking, memory management, and ad-blocking status.

- Displays today's date and current time.

- The top section is called the Tab, and the upper part of the left toolbar is called the Application.

- The homepage background image can be customized or set to automatically display scenic photos.
translations.- You can quickly switch Sessions using: - You can quickly switch Sessions using the shortcut "Option" + "N".
translations.- You can quickly switch sessions using:
- You can quickly switch sessions using the shortcut "Option" + "W".

- "Option" + "⬆️" + "W" for Session Management
translations.- You can use \"Option\" + \"z\" or \"Co:
- You can use "Option" + "z" or "Control" + "tab" to quickly switch between tabs.

- "Option" + "1–9" quickly switches to tabs in positions 1 to 9
translations.- [**Click here to visit the official we:
- [**Click here to visit the official website**](https://join.meetsidekick.com/pokbg){:target="_blank"}

- Click "Download Now"

- Choose the version that matches your operating system

- Download & complete the installation

- Open Sidekick
translations.- [Is Using Google Sites to Build a Pers:
- [Is Using Google Sites to Build a Personal Website Still Relevant?](../724a7fb9a364/)

- [Create a "Fake" Transparent Phone Wallpaper Easily with iPhone](../2e4429f410d6/)

- [Medium Custom Domain Feature Returns](../d9a95d4224ea/)

- [ZReviewsBot — Slack App Review Notification Bot](../33f6aabb744f/)
translations.1. Download & Install Chrome\n\n2. Sign:
1. Download & Install Chrome

2. Sign in to Chrome

3. Complete syncing browser data from Google account to Chrome

4. **Completely close Chrome (! Important ! MacOS users please make sure there is no small dot below the Chrome icon in the Dock)**

5. Continue from the previous step to create an account

6. When you create an account for the first time, it will ask you which browser you want to import data from.

7. Choose Chrome

8. Wait for the import to complete
translations.> \"Not making a profit as a business is: > "Not making a profit as a business is a sin (If you don't make money, it's a sin against society because we use society's funds and talent. Without sufficient profits, we waste valuable social resources that could be used more effectively elsewhere.)" - Panasonic Founder — Konosuke Matsushita (Text referenced from Business Mind Academy)
translations.> ***Not sure if they will switch to the: > ***Not sure if they will switch to their own Sidekick Sync in the future, as that would allow better optimization and integration.***
translations.> ***The only concern is that this produ: > ***The only concern is that this product is still very new, and it’s uncertain how far it will go; if mismanaged, development and maintenance might stop, which would be a great loss! So please help promote and support it!***
translations.> *Chromium != Chrome, Chromium is the o: > *Chromium != Chrome, Chromium is the open-source project that forms the core technology of the browser.*
translations.> *If an Application added from the home: > *If an Application added from the homepage doesn't appear in the left Sidebar, you can drag it there manually.*
translations.> *More features await your exploration: > *More features await your exploration and experience!*
translations.> *Not many websites support multi-accou: > *Not many websites support multi-account switching; for unsupported sites, you can use Private Mode. Currently, Slack and Notion are supported.*
translations.> *Sessions do not affect the active App: > *Sessions do not affect the active Application on the left.*
translations.> *There is a small issue here: if you d: > *There is a small issue here: if you don't create a new account (e.g., reinstall), you can only import bookmarks, browsing history, and saved passwords; extensions cannot be imported automatically. [According to the official Q&A, you have to reinstall extensions yourself from the Chrome extension / app store](https://help.meetsidekick.com/en/articles/4145356-general-faqs){:target="_blank"}.*
translations.> *Unlike Chrome, which binds and syncs: > *Unlike Chrome, which binds and syncs browser data directly with your Google account upon login; **you'll find that after logging into Sidekick, no data is imported. This is because [Google currently blocks all third-party services from accessing sync features](https://help.meetsidekick.com/en/articles/5224854-synchronisation-issues){:target="_blank"}, so Sidekick cannot sync or import data directly through your account.***
translations.> This article uses my personal computer: > This article uses my personal computer, not a work device; therefore, social and entertainment websites are mixed in. Please kindly understand.
translations.Application 可以快速從首頁加入，也可以從 Tab 建立或手動輸入網址: Applications can be quickly added from the homepage, created from a tab, or manually added by entering the URL and ICON image.
translations.Chromium 核心，因為要支援我常用的擴充功能\n: Chromium core, because it needs to support the extensions I frequently use
translations.Google Keep 儲存於雲端 Google 帳號，支援跨平台跨裝置的筆記同: Google Keep is stored in the cloud via Google Account, supporting cross-platform and cross-device note syncing and access.
translations.Here’s a link to download Arc, the brows: Here’s a link to download Arc, the browser I was telling you about!
translations.Sidekick 同步設定，只有可憐的搜尋字詞同步\n\n: Sidekick Sync Settings: Only Poor Search Terms Are Synced
translations.Sidekick 已內建了上百個生產力工具網站，可快速加入 Applicatio: Sidekick has built-in support for hundreds of productivity tool websites, allowing quick addition to Applications.
translations.Sidekick 瀏覽器功能介紹＆使用心得\n\n: Introduction to Sidekick Browser Features & User Experience
translations.[Sidekick 近期將會釋出 Sidekick Sync 解決這個問題](h: [Sidekick will soon release Sidekick Sync to solve this issue](https://help.meetsidekick.com/en/articles/5224854-synchronisation-issues){:target="_blank"} .
translations.[使用 Google Site 建立個人網站還跟得上時代嗎](../724a7f: [Is Using Google Sites to Build a Personal Website Still Relevant?](../724a7fb9a364/)
translations.[使用 iPhone 簡單製作「偽」透視透明手機桌布](../2e4429f41: [Create a "Fake" Transparent Phone Wallpaper Easily with iPhone](../2e4429f410d6/)
translations.[支援所有 Chrome 擴充功能，可直接到商城下載安裝](https://ch: [Supports all Chrome extensions, available for direct download from the store](https://chrome.google.com/webstore?hl=zh-TW){:target="_blank"}
translations.⬇️⬇️⬇️ 如果你是從 Chrome 要轉換到 Sidekick， **請先閱: ⬇️⬇️⬇️ If you are switching from Chrome to Sidekick, **please read this entire section before creating an account** ⬇️⬇️⬇️
translations.「Option」＋「1–9」快速切換位置 1~9 的Tab\n: "Option" + "1–9" quickly switches to tabs in positions 1 to 9
translations.「企業不賺錢是種罪惡 (你不賺錢，是對社會的罪惡，因為我們拿社會的資金，取社會的: "Not making a profit as a business is a sin (If you don't make money, it's a sin against society because we use society's funds and talent. Without sufficient profits, we waste valuable social resources that could be used more effectively elsewhere.)" - Panasonic Founder — Konosuke Matsushita (Text referenced from Business Mind Academy)
translations.一個好的產品要能有好的現金流，才能提供更好的服務也才能走得更久；以下是 Side: A good product needs a healthy cash flow to provide better services and sustain long-term; below are Sidekick's pricing details:
translations.上方我們稱為 Tab，左側工具列上方稱為 Application\n: The top section is called the Tab, and the upper part of the left toolbar is called the Application.
translations.不只是網站的快速入口， 使用起來類似 MacOS 的 Dock，Applicat: Not just a quick access to websites, the Application feature works like the MacOS Dock. When an Application site is active, it stays resident in the browser (indicated by a small dot on the left) while managing memory efficiently. If the active site has notifications, it will show a numbered badge as an alert.
translations.中間分隔大小可以自由拖曳調整。\n\n: The divider size in the middle can be freely dragged and adjusted.
translations.主要原因是我常用的擴充功能不能完全支援，太依賴也太習慣 Chrome 的擴充功能: The main reason is that the extensions I frequently use are not fully supported. I'm too reliant on and accustomed to Chrome's extensions. Secondly, even though the Chromium core allows painless support, the features are not particularly outstanding and the experience is similar to using Google Chrome.
translations.人員資料部分也不能同步 Google 的帳號資訊\n\n: User account information cannot be synced with Google accounts either.
translations.以個人使用來說免費方案啜啜有餘，但如果有能力就不妨贊助一下開發團隊吧！\n\n: For personal use, the free plan is more than enough, but if you can, consider supporting the development team!
translations.以往都會迷失在混亂的 Tab 中，或只能使用 Pin Tab 方式把固定重要的工: I used to get lost in a chaotic mess of tabs or could only use Pin Tab to keep important work services fixed at the front; but switching between them was still painful and required searching.
translations.使用 Google、Microsoft 或直接建立 Sidekick 帳號；這個: Use Google, Microsoft, or create a Sidekick account directly; this account is for Sidekick services and is not related to Google or Microsoft.
translations.使用方法，只要點擊瀏覽器右上角的分割視窗按鈕，選擇要加入左方的視窗即可，再點一次: How to use: simply click the split window button at the top right of the browser, select the window to add to the left side, and click again to close the split.
translations.例如，這樣就可以邊上線上課＆做筆記。\n\n: For example, this allows you to attend online classes and take notes at the same time.
translations.內建整合 Google Keep 雲端筆記功能，點擊左下方文件 Icon 可快速: Built-in integration with Google Keep cloud notes allows you to quickly open Google Keep for note-taking by clicking the document icon at the bottom left.
translations.匯入完成後，所有書籤、瀏覽紀錄、已存密碼、已登入的網站 Session、擴充功能: After importing, all bookmarks, browsing history, saved passwords, logged-in website sessions, and extensions are seamlessly transferred to Sidekick; only a few services require re-login, while the rest do not—truly a painless migration!
translations.可以使用「Option」＋「z」或「Control」+「tab」進行 Tab 的: You can use "Option" + "z" or "Control" + "tab" to quickly switch between tabs.
translations.可以使用快捷鍵「Option」+「N」快速進行 Session 切換\n: You can quickly switch Sessions using the shortcut "Option" + "N".
translations.可以使用快捷鍵「Option」+「W」快速進行 Session 切換\n: You can quickly switch sessions using the shortcut "Option" + "W".
translations.可以使用這個功能快速紀錄事項。\n\n: You can use this feature to quickly record notes.
translations.可以在 Session 之間切換，點擊「Activate」即可恢復 Tab。\n: You can switch between Sessions and click "Activate" to restore the Tabs.
translations.同 Chrome 上很流行的 Tab Saver 擴充功能，能快速儲存目前已打開: Like the popular Tab Saver extension on Chrome, it allows you to quickly save currently open tabs and switch between them, making it easier to manage different work states.
translations.在 Application 按右鍵可快速查看最近瀏覽、另外也支援多帳號切換。\n: Right-clicking on an Application allows quick access to recent browsing, and it also supports multiple account switching.
translations.大約 2023 年初我就跳槽去用 [Arc 瀏覽器啦！](https://arc: Around early 2023, I switched to using [Arc browser!](https://arc.net/gift/f86ef8b3){:target="_blank"} The experience and features are better, with fewer bugs and support for cross-device sync.
translations.如同前文安裝步驟，第一次安裝打開、建立帳號登入後；可以無痛從現有的 Safari: As mentioned in the installation steps, after opening and creating an account for the first time, you can seamlessly transfer all bookmarks, browsing history, saved passwords, logged-in website sessions, and extensions from existing Safari, Chrome, or Edge browsers.
translations.如果你本來就是 Chrome 的使用者可以跳過 1~3 步驟。\n\n: If you are already a Chrome user, you can skip steps 1 to 3.
translations.如果是雙螢幕使用者，同樣可以把 Tab 拉成獨立視窗；獨立視窗就不會有左方的工具: For dual monitor users, you can also drag a tab into a separate window; the separate window will not have the toolbar on the left.
translations.完成同步 Google 帳號上的瀏覽器資料到 Chrome\n: Complete syncing browser data from Google account to Chrome
translations.官方給的方法非常繞路，但目前也只能這樣。\n\n: The official method is very roundabout, but for now, it's the only way.
translations.實際上現在開始，只要有提供 Web 版的通訊服務，都可以直接使用 Sidekic: In fact, from now on, any web-based communication service can be used directly through the Sidekick Application without needing to install a separate desktop app. As mentioned earlier, the Application's notification feature works just like a desktop app, providing real-time and complete alerts.
translations.左上方數據化顯示反追蹤、記憶體管理、反廣告狀況\n: Top left corner shows data on anti-tracking, memory management, and ad-blocking status
translations.左方 Application 與上方 Tab 互不影響，Application: The Application section on the left and the Tabs at the top do not affect each other. The Application area is independent and does not appear in the top Tabs.
translations.已登入的網站 Session、擴充功能我覺得是體驗最好的，以往的瀏覽器都只做書籤: Logged-in website sessions and extensions provide the best experience in my opinion. Previous browsers only transferred bookmarks, but you had to log in to all websites again and reinstall all extensions, which was very frustrating.
translations.搜尋匡可搜尋 瀏覽紀錄、書籤，若無搜尋結果則自動變 Google 搜尋\n: The search box can search browsing history and bookmarks; if no results are found, it automatically switches to Google search.
translations.擴充功能：支援所有 Chrome Store 擴充功能 (bitwarden、l: Extensions: Supports all Chrome Store extensions (bitwarden, lastpass, 1password, grammarly, google translate…)
translations.支援 MacOS，iOS 我習慣用 Safari 所以不要求支援跨裝置\n: Supports MacOS. I usually use Safari on iOS, so I don't require cross-device support.
translations.支援平台：Windows、Mac OS、Mac OS (M1)、Linux (d: Supported platforms: Windows, Mac OS, Mac OS (M1), Linux (deb), Linux (rpm)
translations.既然 Google 封鎖第三方存取雲端資料，那如何解決書籤跨裝置同步問題呢？\n: Since Google blocks third-party access to cloud data, how can the bookmark sync issue across devices be resolved?
translations.映入眼簾的是 Sidekick 介紹頁，點擊上方「Continue」繼續。\n\: The Sidekick introduction page appears. Click "Continue" at the top to proceed.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有更多特色功能，幫助提升生產力\n: More features to help boost productivity
translations.本文使用的是我個人電腦，非辦公用；所以會夾雜社群娛樂網站，敬請見諒。\n\n: This article uses my personal computer, not a work device; therefore, social and entertainment websites are mixed in. Please kindly understand.
translations.核心價值： **專為工作流程優化，提升生產力的瀏覽器**\n: Core Value: **A browser designed specifically to optimize workflows and boost productivity**
translations.每個 App 都可個別進行設定，例如關閉通知、關閉 Badge 等等。\n\n: Each app can be configured individually, such as turning off notifications or disabling badges.
translations.現在我要做 Code Review 時就點 Github、要送審 App 時就點: Now when I do a code review, I just click Github; when I submit an app for review, I click App Store Connect; when I check projects, I click Asana. It makes work very efficient.
translations.現在邀請 10 位使用者 6 個月 Pro / 邀請 20 位使用者終身 Pro: Currently offering a plan to invite 10 users for 6 months of Pro / invite 20 users for lifetime Pro; so if you like this article, you can download and install via the [in-article link to support me and Sidekick!](https://join.meetsidekick.com/pokbg){:target="_blank"}
translations.目前加入的使用者都是屬於 Early access 方案，貌似不受 Free 方: Currently, all users who joined are on the Early Access plan, which seems unaffected by the Free plan (I have more than 5 Sidebar apps without any issues).
translations.知道 Sidekick 瀏覽器是來自同事的分享；老實說一開始並沒有抱太大期待，其: I learned about the Sidekick browser from a colleague's recommendation. Honestly, I didn't have high expectations at first. Over the past few years, I've considered ditching Chrome and tried Safari, Safari Technology Preview, Firefox, Opera, and other third-party browsers based on open-source cores. But I kept failing and almost always ended up reinstalling Chrome after just a few days. Another reason is that I haven't actively followed the browser market, so maybe there was already a browser that met my needs—I just didn't know about it.
translations.第一次建立完帳號，會問你要從哪個瀏覽器匯入資料\n: When you create an account for the first time, it will ask you which browser you want to import data from.
translations.繼續前一步的建立帳號\n: Continue from the previous step to create an account
translations.與 Chrome 單調的首頁不同也不需要花心力去找首頁解決方案，Sidekick: Unlike Chrome's monotonous homepage, Sidekick comes with a beautiful and convenient built-in homepage, so you don't need to spend time finding a homepage solution.
translations.記得授權 Sidekick 發送電腦端通知；這樣網頁的通知才會在電腦端跳出來提示: Remember to authorize Sidekick to send desktop notifications; this way, web notifications will pop up on your computer.
translations.記憶體管理的部分，沒有特別做研究測試；不太確定優化效果，但有總比沒有好。\n\n: Regarding memory management, I haven't done specific research or testing; I'm not sure about the optimization effects, but having it is better than not.
translations.這陣子使用下來，因為無痛轉移的緣故；已經完全捨棄 Chrome，也沒有什麼東西是: After using it for a while, thanks to the painless migration, I have completely abandoned Chrome. There’s nothing that absolutely requires me to go back to Chrome. The best feature is still the Applications on the left, where you can add frequently used work websites for quick switching and receiving the latest notifications.
translations.選擇符合自己作業系統的版本\n: Choose the version that matches your operating system
translations.開發團隊：Sidekick 新創團隊創立於 2020/11 @ San-Fran: Development Team: Sidekick startup team founded in 11/2020 @ San Francisco / Currently fundraising
translations.關於生產力功能，其實 Chrome 擴充功能有上千萬的工具可以用，自己搜尋、組合: Regarding productivity features, Chrome extensions offer tens of millions of tools to use, and you can search and combine them to achieve results; however, we haven't conducted any research or surveys, so honestly, we're not sure which workflows and features truly boost productivity.
translations.隱私浪潮的來襲，各大企業漸漸開始注重用戶隱私，以 Apple 為最主要領導者，在: With the rise of the privacy wave, major companies are gradually focusing on user privacy, with Apple as the main leader. The new Safari also includes built-in privacy protection features. However, as the biggest beneficiary of privacy data through Google Ads, I think it will be hard to see changes in Google Chrome.
translations.雖然 Chromium 也是由 Google 主導，但他開源自由原始碼的特性；讓: Although Chromium is also led by Google, its open-source nature allows any developer to optimize based on its core; Sidekick uses this approach to improve upon Chromium, retaining Chrome's features while enhancing the functions Chrome lacks.
translations.雖然 MacOS 自帶視窗分割功能，但我其實很少使用；除非是想要完全進入專注狀態: Although MacOS has a built-in window split feature, I rarely use it; unless I want to fully focus. Most of the time, I need to view web content side-by-side while using other MacOS apps, so the browser's split window function is very useful!
translations.類似 MacOS 的 Spotlight，在任何視窗都能按下「Option」+「: Similar to macOS Spotlight, you can press "Option" + "f" in any window to perform a full browser search.
translations.顯示今日日期、現在時間\n: Display today's date and current time
translations.首頁背景圖可客製化，或自動展示風景圖\n: The homepage background image can be customized or automatically display scenic photos.
translations.點擊上方「Add new session」可以將目前 Tab 狀態儲存下來，開啟: Click "Add new session" above to save the current tab state and open a fresh, clean browsing environment.
translations.點擊左下角的「F」(First Session) 即可進入 Session 管理: Click the "F" (First Session) at the bottom left to enter the Session management page.
